title: career-ops.steering-queue.answered v1
description: Emitted by job-search-se's server/steeringRoutes.js when a career-ops-queue entry (career-ops/data/steering-queue.json) is answered via the SteeringView UI. Pairs with career-ops.steering-queue.requested.v1's id as the correlation key so hearth-api can clear the phone notification card raised on request. Distinct from career-ops.steering.answered.v1, which is an unrelated behavioural-memory-steering concept.

id.description: steering-queue.json entry id — matches the id from the paired requested.v1 event.

answer.description: Eric's answer, as recorded in steering-queue.json.

kind.description: Echo of the requested.v1 kind so consumers can disambiguate answer shape (a secret_request answer is a vault pointer like 'stored: api/foo-key -> hearth-vault', never the value).
